title: Input Mask Event
description: Represents the event payload when an input mask value changes, providing both masked and unmasked values along with completion status.

props.name: masked
props.description: The formatted/masked value as displayed to the user.

props.name: completed
props.description: Indicates whether the input mask is completely filled.

sections.title: Event Definition
sections.description: The complete TypeScript definition for the input mask event interface.
